artStyle: Classic comic book illustration with bold ink outlines, halftone dot shading, and vivid flat colors. Dynamic action poses and expressive characters. Strong black linework with cel-shaded coloring. Panel-art composition adapted to vertical format.
lighting: Stylized directional lighting with hard-edged shadows. Bold rim lights on characters. Color-coded lighting to set mood per scene. No realistic light falloff, shadows are graphic shapes.
compositionRules: Dynamic diagonal compositions with characters in action poses. Bold foreground subjects with speed lines or impact effects. Upper third kept clear for captions. Strong silhouettes readable at small scale.
culturalMarkers: Context-appropriate settings and attire matching the topic's era and geography. Props and environments that establish the scene authentically.
antiArtifactGuidance: Clean consistent ink line weights. Smooth flat color fills without gradients bleeding. Sharp panel-style framing. Expressive but proportional facial features. Clear hand and finger definition even in action poses.
